title: Statistical Significance Audit of Iter 2 Circuit Motif Spectroscopy Claims
summary: Demonstrates a rigorous statistical audit of circuit motif spectroscopy claims across 6 phases: permutation tests for NMI/ARI significance, bootstrap confidence intervals for FFL Z-scores across 8 task domains, layer confound analysis with Wilcoxon signed-rank test and Z retention ratios, Cohen's d and eta-squared effect sizes, and robustness checks (leave-one-out, seed stability, feature ablation). Uses 10 attribution graphs from the neuronpedia dataset spanning 8 domains (antonym, arithmetic, code_completion, country_capital, multi_hop_reasoning, rhyme, sentiment, translation). Runs with full original parameters (1000 permutations, 10000 bootstrap samples) in ~5 seconds. Produces a 4-panel visualization showing Z-scores by domain, layer confound scatter, feature ablation impact, and permutation null distribution.
